scripts.build: tsc -b --clean && tsc -b && pnpm --filter @openclaw-enhanced/bamdra-memory-context-engine run bundle && pnpm --filter @openclaw-enhanced/bamdra-memory-tools run bundle && node ./scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.clean: find . -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -name tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -delete
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && node --test bamdra-*/tests/**/*.test.mjs
